## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog pages showing concerning trend with click losses centered around 6 pages (70% of clicks lost compared to peak 2 weeks ago)](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Per diem pages experiencing drops in rankings, potentially due to algorithm updates and .gov sites appearing in SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [New process implemented for tracking assignments and reviews in the shared spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to avoid content overlap with existing Ramp articles for future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Mara Leighton: New associate director at GrowthX, background in journalism and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Victoria Naef: Owns accounting and vendor management pillars at Ramp, focusing on vendor directory project](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Matt Angelosanto: Working on Ramp's editorial function and automation capabilities since June 2022](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Ali Mercieca: SEO strategist for business credit cards and treasury pillars at Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Blog pages:](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Click losses centered around 6 pages (70% of clicks lost)](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Best business card pages facing UX challenges compared to competitors like NerdWallet](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [60% of pages experienced position losses, many losing featured snippets](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Per diem pages:](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Dropped for second consecutive week after hitting peak two weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [.gov websites appearing in SERPs, pushing Ramp and competitors below the fold](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [Core Web Vitals issues detected, though not necessarily causing major problems](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Expense category pages:](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Holding steady, no significant movement in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [Some Core Web Vitals issues detected but not affecting performance](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

### Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [New process implemented for tracking assignments and reviews in shared spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Assignments tab now central hub for reviews and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - ["Client should review" status indicates articles ready for Ramp team review](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [20 articles addressed with feedback, awaiting final sign-off before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Discussion on how to streamline the review process and communication](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [Vendor pages delivered last week, awaiting feedback](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Sample article for "Best Business Bank in Alabama" delivered](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [20 additional articles ready for review under "edited" status](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

### Content Overlap Concerns

  - [Some Treasury SEO drafts overlapping with existing Ramp content (e.g., bank reconciliation, cash burn rate)](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to improve keyword research process to avoid future overlaps](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [Suggestion to include broad match keywords and existing Ramp URLs in topic proposals for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to update spreadsheet with correct article links and clarify review process](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [Ramp team to review and provide feedback on delivered articles](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement broader keyword research and include existing Ramp URLs in future topic proposals to avoid content overlap](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance, especially in light of ongoing Google algorithm updates](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Consider UX improvements for best business card pages to compete with other financial websites](https://fathom.video/share/K2LJQy1pwyksUZ1brbvwk3mw4tQhjz3e?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
